text.title: raci-matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for raci-matrix as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: A role that is "A" on more than 60% of the tasks in the matrix.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Heavy A concentration is a bottleneck indicator — that role becomes the single point of approval for most decisions. Distribute Accountable roles across appropriate decision-makers.

failure-mode.description: All roles assigned "I" for a task (all-I row).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An all-I row means everyone is notified but no one executes or decides. This signals the underlying task is too vague to assign ownership.

failure-mode.description: Assigning an AI agent as Accountable for any task in a RACI matrix.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents lack authority, legal accountability, and organizational standing. A-role requires a human who can be held responsible for outcomes.

failure-mode.description: Agents assigning themselves or "AI" as Accountable in the drafted matrix.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs default to including themselves as stakeholders when generating role assignments. Explicitly forbid this in the system prompt and validate with raci-validator.

failure-mode.description: Agents hallucinating stakeholder names not on the provided roles list.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs invent plausible names when the list is incomplete. Pass the roles list as explicit input and instruct the agent to reject any role not on it.

failure-mode.description: Storing the authoritative RACI as a Markdown table when an agent mutates it iteratively.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Markdown table parsing is brittle for programmatic mutation. Store as YAML for agent operations; render as Markdown only for human review.
